stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Regarding the engine type shown in the figure, what does Engine Pressure Ratio (EPR) indicate and what is it a ratio of?

options.a: Thrust, ratio of the compressor entry pressure to the turbine outlet pressure
options.b: Thrust, ratio of the turbine exhaust pressure to the compressor entry pressure
options.c: Fuel flow ratio measured across the combustion chamber
options.d: Thrust, ratio of fan pressure to turbine pressure
